title: mariscus ligularis
intro: Mariscus ligularis, also known as Sphagneticola trilobata, is a tropical vine native to Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mariscus ligularis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, infusions, or topical creams, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
